content:
# Final Review Votes
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Verified the amendment against actual code. load_controller (line 790) indeed lacks level = "debug" in its #[tracing::instrument] and uses tracing::info! at line 803, while all peer read-only functions (load_milestone at line 1476, load_snapshot at line 1492, read_journal at line 2147, read_bead_lineage at line 2351, list_tasks_for_milestone at line 2480) consistently use level = "debug". The inconsistency is confirmed and the fix is correct.

## Votes

- `fr-3-9b4d5e90`: Accept
  Verified in source: load_controller at controller.rs:790 uses default INFO level and tracing::info! at line 803, while all five peer read-only functions in service.rs (load_milestone:1476, load_snapshot:1492, read_journal:2147, read_bead_lineage:2351, list_tasks_for_milestone:2480) use level = "debug". load_controller is a pure state-read (hydrates + validates, no writes), making it semantically identical to those peers. The proposed fix — adding level = "debug" to the instrument attribute and downgrading the inner log to tracing::debug! — restores consistency with the established convention and correctly classifies this internal read operation.
